channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋） 1. TikTokがスーパーアプリへの道を歩む 2. もはやAnthropi…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋）

1. TikTokがスーパーアプリへの道を歩む
2. もはやAnthropicとOpenAIの競争ではない
3. プライムデー最終日 140以上のお得な商品から選べるチャンス

本日の注目ニュース全10本はnoteで → https://note.com/grim1149/m/m7fde0cd2638a
📮 全件＋詳細はメルマガで → https://grimmiraai.substack.com/

#AIニュース #ChatGPT #生成AI #AI活用 #AIテックニュース

📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋）

1. TikTokがスーパーアプリへの道を歩む
2. もはやAnthropicとOpenAIの競争ではない
3. プライムデー最終日 140以上のお得な商品から選べるチャンス

item.title: 台風消滅したらしいですね🌀 とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫 土曜の夜、夜更かしして…
item.author: 白川えま✨Aroma Levante (@emalevante.bsky.social)
item.description:
台風消滅したらしいですね🌀
とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫

土曜の夜、夜更かししてるお兄様🥰
よかったらオイルマッサージで癒されに来ませんか✨
この後2:00までDMお返事できませんので、ご予約の方はお店まで📞

お待ちしております(*´˘`*)♡

#メンエス #メンズエステ #代々木
item.content:encoded:

とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫

この後2:00までDMお返事できませんので、ご予約の方はお店まで📞

お待ちしております(*´˘`*)♡

#メンエス #メンズエステ #代々木

item.title: Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began co…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:
item.content:encoded:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:

item.title: ＜鉢植えアジサイ・管理のコツ＞ 梅雨を彩る紫陽花。翌年もきれいに咲かせるには、置き場所や水やりに加え、7月中旬までの剪定…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
＜鉢植えアジサイ・管理のコツ＞
梅雨を彩る紫陽花。翌年もきれいに咲かせるには、置き場所や水やりに加え、7月中旬までの剪定と植え替えが重要です。フラワーアーティストによる季節ごとのお手入れポイントをご紹介します。
weathernews.jp/news/202606/...
item.content:encoded:
＜鉢植えアジサイ・管理のコツ＞
梅雨を彩る紫陽花。翌年もきれいに咲かせるには、置き場所や水やりに加え、7月中旬までの剪定と植え替えが重要です。フラワーアーティストによる季節ごとのお手入れポイントをご紹介します。

item.title: ローリー・アンダーソンが 京都賞を受賞されたそうです おめでとうございます🍾 彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード 俺の太極…
item.author: 翻訳の吉田俊太郎 (@shuntaroyoshida.bsky.social)
item.description:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！

ご興味ある方はぜひ！

item.title: Widespread flooding across Kentucky has left at least four d…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Widespread flooding across Kentucky has left at least four dead, prompting dozens of rescues after heavy rains wiped out bridges and inundated roads, with more significant rainfall on the way.https://cnn.it/4ezI3Fb
item.content:encoded: Widespread flooding across Kentucky has left at least four dead, prompting dozens of rescues after heavy rains wiped out bridges and inundated roads, with more significant rainfall on the way.https://cnn.it/4ezI3Fb

item.title: Mamdani just showed up at Penn Station, wristbands in hand, …
item.author: Luca Migo ❌👑 (@victinibcn.bsky.social)
item.description: Mamdani just showed up at Penn Station, wristbands in hand, helping World Cup fans find their trains like it was nothing. Panama vs England, MetLife bound, and the mayor was just out there in the crowd. No big deal. Very big deal.
item.content:encoded: Mamdani just showed up at Penn Station, wristbands in hand, helping World Cup fans find their trains like it was nothing. Panama vs England, MetLife bound, and the mayor was just out there in the crowd. No big deal. Very big deal.

item.title: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of…
item.author: Gwyllm Llwydd (@gwyllm.bsky.social)
item.description: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of people. And you can’t hurt lots of people without, in some sense, believing that they’re not really people.” Corey Doctorow
item.content:encoded: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of people. And you can’t hurt lots of people without, in some sense, believing that they’re not really people.” Corey Doctorow

item.title: 久生十蘭『黒い手帳 探偵くらぶ』（日下三蔵編 光文社文庫）を読み始め。十蘭のミステリ・幻想小説を集めた作品集です。 「…
item.author: 奇妙な世界 (@kimyonasekai.bsky.social)
item.description:
久生十蘭『黒い手帳　探偵くらぶ』（日下三蔵編　光文社文庫）を読み始め。十蘭のミステリ・幻想小説を集めた作品集です。

「黒い手帳」
巴里の安下宿の五階に住むようになった「自分」は、四階に住む夫婦と六階に住む男と知り合いになります。四階の夫婦はあるパトロンから資金援助を受けて勉強に来ていた音楽家でしたが、パトロンの破産に伴い、経済的な破綻を迎えていました。夫はギャンブルで取り返そうと、ルウレットの研究を独自に進めていました。
一方、六階に住む男は、長年ルウレットの研究をしており、遂に確実に設ける理論を完成させたといいます。その内容を黒い手帳にまとめていました。
item.content:encoded:
久生十蘭『黒い手帳　探偵くらぶ』（日下三蔵編　光文社文庫）を読み始め。十蘭のミステリ・幻想小説を集めた作品集です。

「黒い手帳」
巴里の安下宿の五階に住むようになった「自分」は、四階に住む夫婦と六階に住む男と知り合いになります。四階の夫婦はあるパトロンから資金援助を受けて勉強に来ていた音楽家でしたが、パトロンの破産に伴い、経済的な破綻を迎えていました。夫はギャンブルで取り返そうと、ルウレットの研究を独自に進めていました。
一方、六階に住む男は、長年ルウレットの研究をしており、遂に確実に設ける理論を完成させたといいます。その内容を黒い手帳にまとめていました。

item.title: LSEG: tech companies have raised $3.1B from mainland China s…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
LSEG: tech companies have raised $3.1B from mainland China stock market listings YTD, up 5x+ from a year earlier, as AI and chip companies drive onshore IPOs (Reuters)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
LSEG: tech companies have raised $3.1B from mainland China stock market listings YTD, up 5x+ from a year earlier, as AI and chip companies drive onshore IPOs (Reuters)

item.title: A Michigan couple have been charged with murder, child abuse…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A Michigan couple have been charged with murder, child abuse and torture in connection with the death last year of their 7-year-old son, who at the time weighed 255 pounds, according to court filings.
item.content:encoded: A Michigan couple have been charged with murder, child abuse and torture in connection with the death last year of their 7-year-old son, who at the time weighed 255 pounds, according to court filings.

item.title: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que…
item.author: Serge Katz (@sk-serge.bsky.social)
item.description: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.
item.content:encoded: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.

item.title: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White H…
item.author: Barack Obama (@barackobama.bsky.social)
item.description: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.
item.content:encoded: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.

item.title: Take Texas to court. You can't force your warped religious b…
item.author: Lawrence (@ldog562.bsky.social)

Texas mandates Bible readings and Christian-infused curriculum in public schools.

item.content:encoded:
Take Texas to court. You can't force your warped religious beliefs on another full stop,
Texas mandates Bible readings and Christian-infused curriculum in public schools.
www.salon.com/2026/06/27/t...

item.title: I am browsing a bookstore and I just heard someone, having a…
item.author: Sarah Pinsker (@sarahpinsker.bsky.social)
item.description:
I am browsing a bookstore and I just heard someone, having asked specifically for books by a specific author, and having had the clerk hand her a book and say "this is my favorite of hers," ask "So do I have to buy it or can I just rent it?"

Madam, what you are looking for is called a library.
item.content:encoded:
I am browsing a bookstore and I just heard someone, having asked specifically for books by a specific author, and having had the clerk hand her a book and say "this is my favorite of hers," ask "So do I have to buy it or can I just rent it?"

Madam, what you are looking for is called a library.

item.title: Happy Caturday.
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description: Happy Caturday.
item.content:encoded: Happy Caturday.

item.title: “It’s a disaster World Cup” - Medhi Taremi, Iran captain. G…
item.author: Prashant 🌊 (@prasshant.bsky.social)
item.description:
“It’s a disaster World Cup” - Medhi Taremi, Iran captain.
Good for him to speak up, his body language says a lot more than his words. 😕
item.content:encoded:
“It’s a disaster World Cup” - Medhi Taremi, Iran captain.
Good for him to speak up, his body language says a lot more than his words. 😕

item.title: El capitán de la Selección de Irán, Mehdi Taremi, ha explota…
item.author: Fonsi Loaiza (@fonsiloaizap.bsky.social)
item.description: El capitán de la Selección de Irán, Mehdi Taremi, ha explotado contra la mafia de la FIFA y la organización de Estados Unidos del criminal ultraderechista Donald Trump: "Han hecho todo lo posible para eliminarnos. Nos quieren fuera".
item.content:encoded: El capitán de la Selección de Irán, Mehdi Taremi, ha explotado contra la mafia de la FIFA y la organización de Estados Unidos del criminal ultraderechista Donald Trump: "Han hecho todo lo posible para eliminarnos. Nos quieren fuera".

item.title: Missouri’s governor opposes outside influence — while backin…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Missouri’s governor opposes outside influence — while backing a measure bankrolled by out-of-state funds.

“The fact that the governor is benefiting directly from … a dark money group from Delaware … shouldn’t be lost on anyone,” a critic said.
item.content:encoded:
Missouri’s governor opposes outside influence — while backing a measure bankrolled by out-of-state funds.

“The fact that the governor is benefiting directly from … a dark money group from Delaware … shouldn’t be lost on anyone,” a critic said.

item.title: "As God as my witness, when I turn 13 and get my lawn mowing…
item.author: SeaTea (@tierno158.bsky.social)
item.description: "As God as my witness, when I turn 13 and get my lawn mowing business going I'm never letting my Mom cut my hair again!"
item.content:encoded: "As God as my witness, when I turn 13 and get my lawn mowing business going I'm never letting my Mom cut my hair again!"

item.description: Happy pride, bitches
item.content:encoded: Happy pride, bitches

item.title: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time …
item.author: Michele (@burienwino.bsky.social)
item.description: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time in 20 years, they're so big the squirrels just walk on them and I can't see any of the pots/water features I have back there for the birds. It's been one hell of growing season in Seattle for some reason.
item.content:encoded: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time in 20 years, they're so big the squirrels just walk on them and I can't see any of the pots/water features I have back there for the birds. It's been one hell of growing season in Seattle for some reason.

item.title: ❤️ adopted animals never forget what ya did ❤️🤍🤎❤️

item.title: 23:35 | 27/06 Approximate flight routes of our UAVs: 🔴 Re…
item.author: DroneBomber (@dronebomber.bsky.social)
item.description:
23:35 | 27/06

Approximate flight routes of our UAVs:

🔴 Red arrows — directions of strike UAV movement;
🔵 Blue arrows — directions of jet-powered UAV movement;
🟢 Green arrows — directions of cruise missile movement;

According to Russian sources, around 370 drones and several missiles
item.content:encoded:
23:35 | 27/06

Approximate flight routes of our UAVs:

🔴 Red arrows — directions of strike UAV movement;
🔵 Blue arrows — directions of jet-powered UAV movement;
🟢 Green arrows — directions of cruise missile movement;

According to Russian sources, around 370 drones and several missiles

item.title: Mehdi Taremi classificou torneio de ‘desastroso’ e acusou FI…
